gender.Description: gender as reported by the participant

handedness.Description: handedness as reported by the participant

vision.Description: vision as reported by the participant

diet.Description: diet as reported by the participant

session_order.Description: order of the hunger and sated sessions

date_session1.Description: date the EEG data for session 1 was obtained

date_session2.Description: date the EEG data for session 2 was obtained

hunger_condition_session1.Description: what was the hunger condition for session 1

hunger_condition_session2.Description: what was the hunger condition for session 2

time_last_meal_session1.Description: reported time since last meal in session 1

time_last_food_session1.Description: reported time since last food intake (including snacks) in session 1

time_last_meal_session2.Description: reported time since last meal in session 2

time_last_food_session2.Description: reported time since last food intake (including snacks) in session 2
